name: Eltingville Club - William Dickey
description:
Lame new student plot.

High token because I was trying to make him semi-accurate, I say semi because I threw some headcanons into the mix about this loser.

Be gentle with me, I've never made a bot before, if the bot is answering for you then it's an LLM issue. I also put Dead dove because I made this scrunkly incel bad, like... Bad bad, he WILL be an irredeemable asshole.

Intro does have a small bit of slight NSFW, but nothing crazy, just mention of Bill staring at ass.

This version is before the whole burning down Joe's comic book store. I'm throwing him into the wild without testing him btw, so let me know if there's issues or if he's any good, if he is then I'll consider making the older version of him too (when he will be worse). But I did make everyone 18+.
creator: Blairie_Bear
